text:
Three PRs merged today to keep the garden growing. We swapped out some infrastructure — Wan and Qwen are now running off Replicate, and we wired up qwen-coder-large and kimi k2.7 via OpenRouter. Better coding models, smoother routing.

Also caught a bug where the text API was getting confused by boolean query params (stream/json). True is true again, false is false. Order is restored in the universe.

Everything is live at pollinations.ai.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdev #apidesign #codinglife
